name: Bisuke
description: Bisuke (ビスケ; English TV "Biscuit") is a ninken and a summoning of Kakashi Hatake.   He bears an uncanny resemblance to Gaara with a kanji imprinted on his head and dark rings around his eyes. However, where Gaara has the kanji for "love" (愛, ai), Bisuke has the kanji for "shinobi" (忍).   (Naruto wiki)
